title: My Job to Care
lesson: Looking after a pet every day teaches you to be responsible and caring.
prompts: In a cozy living room, warm light, the {INPUT_1_AGE} person from the input image sits gently holding a small fluffy brown puppy, with a delighted smile. {INPUT_IMAGE_IDENTITY} Nearby, {GENDER_F_AGE_35_PARENT} kneels nearby smiling warmly. Make the interaction read physically: the child cradles the puppy in their hands while the woman turns toward the child and the puppy, smiling. Exactly one child and one adult in the frame, and no other people.

In a cozy home kitchen — a pet food bowl and a water bowl, warm light — the {INPUT_1_AGE} person from the input image stands in the mid-ground, nodding attentively with one hand resting on their chin, listening as a small fluffy brown puppy sits at their feet. {INPUT_IMAGE_IDENTITY} In the foreground, {GENDER_F_AGE_35_PARENT} points to the pet food bowl while the water bowl sits beside it, explaining with a gentle, instructive smile. Make the interaction read physically: the child, the woman, and the puppy all look toward that one pet food bowl, with the woman's pointing hand aimed at the bowl. Exactly one child and one adult in the frame, and no other people.

In a cozy home kitchen — a pet food bowl and a water bowl, warm light — the {INPUT_1_AGE} person from the input image kneels alone pouring kibble into the pet food bowl for a small fluffy brown puppy, with a caring, focused expression. {INPUT_IMAGE_IDENTITY} The puppy waits happily beside the bowl. Exactly one child in the frame, and no other people.

In a sunny garden, bright daylight, the {INPUT_1_AGE} person from the input image walks holding a leash, with a cheerful smile, as a small fluffy brown puppy trots along on the leash. {INPUT_IMAGE_IDENTITY} Exactly one child in the frame, and no other people.

In a cozy living room, warm light, the {INPUT_1_AGE} person from the input image sits alone gently brushing and cuddling a small fluffy brown puppy, with a tender, happy expression. {INPUT_IMAGE_IDENTITY} Exactly one child in the frame, and no other people.

In a cozy living room, golden afternoon light, the {INPUT_1_AGE} person from the input image sits with the healthy, happy small fluffy brown puppy in their lap, with a proud, joyful smile. {INPUT_IMAGE_IDENTITY} Nearby, {GENDER_F_AGE_35_PARENT} kneels beside them, resting a gentle hand on their shoulder with a warm, approving smile. Make the interaction read physically: the child holds the puppy in their lap while the woman rests a hand on the child's shoulder, both gazes on the puppy between them. Exactly one child and one adult in the frame, and no other people.
gists: In a cozy living room, the child gently holds a small brown puppy, delighted, while the mother kneels nearby smiling.

In a cozy home kitchen with a food bowl and a water bowl, the child nods attentively with a hand on their chin as the puppy sits at their feet, while the mother points to the pet food bowl, explaining a puppy needs daily care.
In the kitchen, the child kneels alone pouring kibble into the pet food bowl while the small brown puppy waits happily beside the bowl, caring and focused.
In a sunny garden, the child walks holding a leash, cheerful, as the small brown puppy trots along on the leash — walking the puppy.
Back in the cozy living room, the child sits alone gently brushing and cuddling the small brown puppy, tender and happy.

In the living room in golden afternoon light, the child sits with the healthy happy puppy in their lap, proud and joyful, while the mother kneels with a hand on their shoulder, approving — caring is the child's job.
texts: One morning, {NAME} cuddled a little brown puppy. "He's so soft!" said {NAME}. "He likes you," said Mum, smiling nearby.
"A puppy needs care every single day," said Mum, pointing to the food bowl. "Food and fresh water?" asked {NAME}. "Every day," said Mum.
{NAME} knelt down and poured the puppy's food into the bowl. "Here you go, puppy," said {NAME}. The puppy waited happily, tail wagging.
Out in the garden, {NAME} took the puppy for a walk on the leash. Trot, trot, trot! "Good boy!" said {NAME}.
Back inside, {NAME} gently brushed and cuddled the puppy. "All clean and cosy," said {NAME}. The puppy felt happy and loved.
The healthy, happy puppy snuggled in {NAME}'s lap. "You take such good care of him," said Mum. "Caring for him is my job!" said {NAME} proudly.
